working_title: Test Story Template: Fake Service Trap
central_question: How does a normal-looking service quote turn into a pressure situation once the customer loses leverage?
audience: internal pipeline testing for research, script, bricktoon visuals, render planning, and QC
value_promise: This fixture should exercise the full workflow with a stable scam-style structure, reusable bricktoon cast roles, and visual proof beats.
testing_notes: Use this topic as the default regression fixture when changing orchestrator or agent logic.
Keep it generic so it survives prompt, cast, render-plan, and QC changes.
